store.name: Mergen ADE
store.tagline: Native terminal workspace for running and organizing multiple project contexts.

apps.name: Mergen ADE
apps.subtitle: Organize multiple project terminals in one native workspace
apps.description: Native Rust terminal workspace for keeping multiple project contexts visible and easy to switch on macOS.
apps.longDescription: Mergen ADE is a desktop terminal workspace for running and organizing multiple project contexts. It keeps multiple terminals visible in a native Rust UI with tiled panes, project grouping, and lightweight persisted state. The project is still Windows-first, but official releases now include a signed and notarized macOS ARM64 DMG.
features: Embedded terminal panes with tiled layout management
Project-aware terminal grouping for fast context switches
Native PTY-backed shell sessions in a lightweight Rust desktop app
Small persisted config that restores useful workspace state
